description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for C++ linting and unit testing. The workflow should trigger on pull requests to specific branches and allow manual triggering. It should have multiple jobs for linting C++ code, testing rdsn with different sanitizers (Release, ASAN, LSAN, UBSAN), and testing Pegasus. Each job should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with a specific container image and perform steps like checking out code, rebuilding third-parties, compiling, and unit testing.
